name: Fried Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium skillet over medium heat, melt margarine.
3. Add rice and stir to coat; cook and stir until rice is golden brown, about 6 minutes.
4. Pour the cooked rice into a 3-quart casserole dish with lid.
5. In the same skillet, add chopped onions and sauté until transparent; add to the rice.
6. Pour soup over the rice mixture.
7. Pour boiling water into a bowl, add bouillon cubes and stir to dissolve. Pour this mixture over the rice.
8. In a small skillet, scramble egg substitute until dry and cut into small pieces; sprinkle on top of the rice mixture.
9. Cover casserole and bake for 1 hour. Serves four to five.
